programme.title: All Girls Garage
programme.desc: Motoring enthusiasts invite you to the workshop.They deal with car repairs, renovations and tuning.Their skills and experience are equal to men.They will take on even the most difficult project.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers 3
programme.desc: A program for lovers of old, classic cars.In each episode, Mike Brewer and Edd China struggle to restore the damaged machine.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers 3
programme.desc: A program for lovers of old, classic cars.In each episode, Mike Brewer and Edd China struggle to restore the damaged machine.

programme.title: Misfit Garage 2
programme.desc: The team of mechanics from Fired-Up Garage takes on new challenges.In the meantime, they also have to face completely different problems, such as the theft of tools.Working together gives them a lot of satisfaction.

programme.title: Road absurdities
programme.desc: In the program "Road Absurdities", Kamil Jaśkowski and Krzysiek Ruszała follow the trail of stupidity and lack of imagination of road workers and officials.The program's hosts go to Poland in a prototype siren with the symbol S201 to take a closer look at examples of incompetence.These include poorly placed signs, streetlights placed in the middle of the road and other places that make life difficult for drivers.The "Road Absurdities" series is an overview of places characterized by careless construction.Mostly, they are behind huge amounts of money spent lightly by officials.Non-functional communication infrastructure facilities are located both on highways, local roads and city streets.The presenters do not stop at showing them in front of the camera, but often intervene in offices, construction contractors and road managers.

programme.title: Road absurdities
programme.desc: In the program "Road Absurdities", Kamil Jaśkowski and Krzysiek Ruszała follow the trail of stupidity and lack of imagination of road workers and officials.The program's hosts go to Poland in a prototype siren with the symbol S201 to take a closer look at examples of incompetence.These include poorly placed signs, streetlights placed in the middle of the road and other places that make life difficult for drivers.The "Road Absurdities" series is an overview of places characterized by careless construction.Mostly, they are behind huge amounts of money spent lightly by officials.Non-functional communication infrastructure facilities are located both on highways, local roads and city streets.The presenters do not stop at showing them in front of the camera, but often intervene in offices, construction contractors and road managers.

programme.title: Steel Buddies
programme.desc: Michael Manousakis and his mechanics from the Morlock Motors workshop will not despise any military vehicle.These are enthusiasts who can boast a long list of projects.

programme.title: Kindig Customs
programme.desc: Dave Kindig runs the Kindig-It Design workshop.It designs, builds and modifies various vehicles for demanding customers.Creates unique machines.

programme.title: Garage Rehab
programme.sub-title: Fast Lane Auto Repair w Nashville
programme.desc: Richard Rawlings found success running the Gas Monkey Garage and the Gas Monkey Bar and Grill.In the new program, he helps other business owners.He gives them tips on what to do to be as successful as he was.For this purpose, he sets off on a journey across the United States and visits subsequent motorcycle and car repair shops that remain in poor financial condition.Richard and his team will diagnose their problems and tell them what needs to be improved to make their company perform better.

programme.title: Garage Rehab
programme.desc: Richard Rawlings found success running the Gas Monkey Garage and the Gas Monkey Bar and Grill.In the new program, he helps other business owners.He gives them tips on what to do to be as successful as he was.For this purpose, he sets off on a journey across the United States and visits subsequent motorcycle and car repair shops that remain in poor financial condition.Richard and his team will diagnose their problems and tell them what needs to be improved to make their company perform better.

programme.title: Megatransporty 2
programme.desc: The team from Zamość, located ten kilometers from the destination of the expedition, has a problem with one of the sets.It gets stuck at the intersection between a tree and a road sign.The subsequent vehicles of the convoy create a two-kilometer traffic jam.Meanwhile, the Toruń team, carrying a milk tank several meters high, cannot continue driving due to a damaged telephone cable.An encounter with a drunk driver poses additional difficulties.A team from Zabrze, transporting historic planes, is trying to pass under the viaduct with only 10 centimeters to spare.

programme.title: Full Pull
programme.desc: The creators of the program will go to Germany, where huge tractors and their owners rule.These tractors are not used for field work and have little in common with agricultural machinery.These are monstrous vehicles weighing up to 4,500 kilograms, often powered by several twelve-cylinder aircraft or turboprop engines, with wheels as tall as a person.In the following episodes, viewers will meet people who are passionate about tractor pulling competition (a tractor with a trailer connected to it, which has... skids instead of wheels).On weekends, enthusiasts of this unique motor sport meet at competitions in various cities.

programme.title: Cornwall Air 999
programme.desc: Paramedics save the lives of many people every day.They take part in dangerous interventions and go wherever someone needs their help.

programme.title: Richard Hammond's Big!
programme.desc: The award-winning British presenter Richard Hammond discovers the secrets of the world's largest structures and machines.The host will explore the secrets hidden by the most famous megastructures.He will learn what makes gigantic buildings resistant to sudden weather changes and unfavorable climatic phenomena.He will also talk to the people responsible for creating the most amazing projects of the 21st century.Together with Hammond we will see, among others:the longest subway tunnel and a cargo ship the size of four football fields.The instructor will not stop at mere observation and will personally test each of the discussed structures.Through a series of interesting and amazing experiments, he will also deepen our scientific knowledge, proving that small things often have great possibilities.

programme.title: Richard Hammond's Big!
programme.desc: The award-winning British presenter Richard Hammond discovers the secrets of the world's largest structures and machines.The host will explore the secrets hidden by the most famous megastructures.He will learn what makes gigantic buildings resistant to sudden weather changes and unfavorable climatic phenomena.He will also talk to the people responsible for creating the most amazing projects of the 21st century.Together with Hammond we will see, among others:the longest subway tunnel and a cargo ship the size of four football fields.The instructor will not stop at mere observation and will personally test each of the discussed structures.Through a series of interesting and amazing experiments, he will also deepen our scientific knowledge, proving that small things often have great possibilities.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers 17
programme.desc: Each episode features Mike Brewer and former Formula 1 mechanic Marc 'Elvis' Priestley.They are struggling with the renovation of a damaged vehicle.Their goal is to sell a used car at a profit.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers 17
programme.desc: Each episode features Mike Brewer and former Formula 1 mechanic Marc 'Elvis' Priestley.They are struggling with the renovation of a damaged vehicle.Their goal is to sell a used car at a profit.

programme.title: Steel Buddies
programme.desc: Michael Manousakis and his mechanics from the Morlock Motors workshop will not despise any military vehicle.These are enthusiasts who can boast a long list of projects.

programme.title: Steel Buddies
programme.desc: Michael Manousakis and his mechanics from the Morlock Motors workshop will not despise any military vehicle.These are enthusiasts who can boast a long list of projects.

programme.title: Extreme Loggers
programme.desc: An interesting series of meetings with people performing one of the most dangerous professions in the world - lumberjacks.To pursue this profession, you must demonstrate certain character traits.You have to be tough, strong and determined.According to statistics from the USA, there are 21 times more cases of death at work in this profession than in other occupations.In the program, we get to know both family businesses that have been cutting down trees for years, as well as huge corporations.We watch as masters of this profession face difficult challenges in the most hostile places on earth.

programme.title: Extreme Loggers
programme.desc: An interesting series of meetings with people performing one of the most dangerous professions in the world - lumberjacks.To pursue this profession, you must demonstrate certain character traits.You have to be tough, strong and determined.According to statistics from the USA, there are 21 times more cases of death at work in this profession than in other occupations.In the program, we get to know both family businesses that have been cutting down trees for years, as well as huge corporations.We watch as masters of this profession face difficult challenges in the most hostile places on earth.

programme.title: A2 - Abenteuer Autobahn
programme.desc: The highway from Berlin to Dortmund is one of the busiest in Germany.The program presents the people who make the route connecting the east and west of the country work like a Swiss clock.

programme.title: A2 - Abenteuer Autobahn
programme.desc: The motorway from Berlin to Dortmund is one of the busiest roads in Germany.In the program, we meet the people who make the route connecting the east with the west function perfectly.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers 15
programme.desc: A program for lovers of old cars.In each episode, Mike Brewer and Ant Anstead struggle to restore a damaged vehicle.Their goal is to renovate and sell a used car at a profit.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers 15
programme.desc: A program for lovers of old cars.In each episode, Mike Brewer and Ant Anstead struggle to restore a damaged vehicle.Their goal is to renovate and sell a used car at a profit.

programme.title: You will be pleased 4
programme.desc: The presenters visit car repair shops with a hidden camera to watch the mechanics work.Krzysztof Woroniecki evaluates their activities and also suggests how to remove simple faults yourself.

programme.title: You will be pleased 4
programme.desc: The presenters visit car repair shops with a hidden camera to watch the mechanics work.Krzysztof Woroniecki evaluates their activities and also suggests how to remove simple faults yourself.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers 4
programme.desc: Mike Brewer and Edd China struggle to restore a damaged car.They try to renovate and sell used vehicles of various brands at a profit.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers 4
programme.desc: Mike Brewer and Edd China struggle to restore a damaged car.They try to renovate and sell used vehicles of various brands at a profit.
